name: Download files from SFTP server
description: Batch pipeline to stream files from SFTP server to Google Cloud Storage bucket to a specific location

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.label: Project ID
parameters.helpText: Project ID where Secret Keys are stored

parameters.name: host
parameters.label: SFTP Server host name
parameters.helpText: Host name/IP address of SFTP Server

parameters.name: username
parameters.label: Username secret key name
parameters.helpText: Actual Username to be extracted from secret key name provided here.

parameters.name: password
parameters.label: Password secret key name
parameters.helpText: Actual Password to be extracted from secret key name provided here.

parameters.name: inputFolder
parameters.label: Input folder on SFTP server
parameters.helpText: Folder on SFTP server from where this will download all the files

parameters.name: inputFilePattern
parameters.label: Input file(s) on SFTP server
parameters.helpText: The input file pattern Dataflow reads from SFTP server. Ex: folder/*

parameters.name: outputFolder
parameters.label: Output Folder in Cloud Storage
parameters.helpText: Output folder where to write downloaded files. Ex: gs://your-bucket/downloaded

parameters.name: concurrency
parameters.label: Concurrent connection to SFTP server
parameters.helpText: Concurrent connection to be created while downloading files. if not given, then it will download all files concurrently

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.label: Chunk size for downloading files
parameters.helpText: Chunk size to stream files from SFTP server to Output folder on GCS bucket, by default it is 1048576 i.e. 1MB
